creator: thindil@laeran.pl.eu.org
text:
Hello Austin, and thank you for your work.

1) The file x11/linux-nvidia-libs/distinfo contains checksum only for the latest release. Is it correct? I think it should have checksums for older version of the driver too.
2) This is more to the maintainer. ;) Nvidia-driver until now, always used the production branch of the driver, not the new features. The new features branch sometimes also brings new bugs. Thus, the question is, should we change the base branch for the package? Or, maybe, create a new package for the branch?
